mapper.select: select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, asset_type, ipo_date, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks s where s.is_active = true and s.finnhub_symbol is not null and exists ( select 1 from portfolio_items pi where pi.stock_id = s.id and pi.is_active = true ) order by ( select case when latest.change_rate_30d is null then 0 else 1 end from ( select sps.change_rate_30d from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id order by sps.snapshot_date desc, sps.id desc limit 1 ) latest ) asc nulls first, ( select max(sps.snapshot_date) from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id ) asc nulls first, s.id asc

select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, asset_type, ipo_date, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks s where s.is_active = true and s.finnhub_symbol is not null and not exists ( select 1 from portfolio_items pi where pi.stock_id = s.id and pi.is_active = true ) order by ( select case when latest.change_rate_30d is null then 0 else 1 end from ( select sps.change_rate_30d from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id order by sps.snapshot_date desc, sps.id desc limit 1 ) latest ) asc nulls first, ( select max(sps.snapshot_date) from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id ) asc nulls first, s.id asc
limit #{limit}

select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, asset_type, ipo_date, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks s where s.is_active = true and s.finnhub_symbol is not null and exists ( select 1 from portfolio_items pi where pi.stock_id = s.id and pi.is_active = true ) and not exists ( select 1 from stock_price_snapshots latest where latest.stock_id = s.id and latest.snapshot_date = ( select max(sps.snapshot_date) from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id ) and latest.change_rate_30d is not null ) order by ( select coalesce(max(pi.updated_at), max(pi.created_at)) from portfolio_items pi where pi.stock_id = s.id and pi.is_active = true ) desc nulls last, ( select max(sps.snapshot_date) from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id ) asc nulls first, s.id asc

select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, asset_type, ipo_date, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks s where s.is_active = true and s.finnhub_symbol is not null and not exists ( select 1 from portfolio_items pi where pi.stock_id = s.id and pi.is_active = true ) and not exists ( select 1 from stock_price_snapshots latest where latest.stock_id = s.id and latest.snapshot_date = ( select max(sps.snapshot_date) from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id ) and latest.change_rate_30d is not null ) order by ( select max(sps.snapshot_date) from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id ) asc nulls first, s.id asc
limit #{limit}
select distinct stock_id from portfolio_items where is_active = true

select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, asset_type, ipo_date, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks where id = #{stockId} and is_active = true and finnhub_symbol is not null limit 1

select stock_id, snapshot_date, current_price, change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d, market_cap, per_value, eps_ttm, revenue_growth_yoy, gross_margin_ttm, net_margin_ttm, operating_margin_ttm, roe_ttm, roa_ttm, roic_ttm, debt_to_equity_ttm, current_ratio_ttm, quick_ratio_ttm, asset_turnover_ttm, free_cash_flow_yield_ttm, operating_cash_flow_ratio_ttm, income_quality_ttm, source from stock_price_snapshots where stock_id = #{stockId} order by snapshot_date desc, id desc limit 1

select current_price from stock_price_snapshots where stock_id = #{stockId} and snapshot_date < #{snapshotDate} and current_price is not null and current_price > 0 order by snapshot_date desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into stock_price_snapshots ( stock_id, snapshot_date, current_price, change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d, market_cap, per_value, eps_ttm, revenue_growth_yoy, gross_margin_ttm, net_margin_ttm, operating_margin_ttm, roe_ttm, roa_ttm, roic_ttm, debt_to_equity_ttm, current_ratio_ttm, quick_ratio_ttm, asset_turnover_ttm, free_cash_flow_yield_ttm, operating_cash_flow_ratio_ttm, income_quality_ttm, source ) values ( #{stockId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{currentPrice}, #{changeRate1d}, #{changeRate7d}, #{changeRate30d}, #{marketCap}, #{perValue}, #{epsTtm}, #{revenueGrowthYoy}, #{grossMarginTtm}, #{netMarginTtm}, #{operatingMarginTtm}, #{roeTtm}, #{roaTtm}, #{roicTtm}, #{debtToEquityTtm}, #{currentRatioTtm}, #{quickRatioTtm}, #{assetTurnoverTtm}, #{freeCashFlowYieldTtm}, #{operatingCashFlowRatioTtm}, #{incomeQualityTtm}, #{source} ) on conflict (stock_id, snapshot_date) do update set current_price = excluded.current_price, change_rate_1d = excluded.change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d = excluded.change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d = excluded.change_rate_30d, market_cap = excluded.market_cap, per_value = excluded.per_value, eps_ttm = excluded.eps_ttm, revenue_growth_yoy = excluded.revenue_growth_yoy, gross_margin_ttm = excluded.gross_margin_ttm, net_margin_ttm = excluded.net_margin_ttm, operating_margin_ttm = excluded.operating_margin_ttm, roe_ttm = excluded.roe_ttm, roa_ttm = excluded.roa_ttm, roic_ttm = excluded.roic_ttm, debt_to_equity_ttm = excluded.debt_to_equity_ttm, current_ratio_ttm = excluded.current_ratio_ttm, quick_ratio_ttm = excluded.quick_ratio_ttm, asset_turnover_ttm = excluded.asset_turnover_ttm, free_cash_flow_yield_ttm = excluded.free_cash_flow_yield_ttm, operating_cash_flow_ratio_ttm = excluded.operating_cash_flow_ratio_ttm, income_quality_ttm = excluded.income_quality_ttm, source = excluded.source

insert into stock_price_snapshots ( stock_id, snapshot_date, current_price, change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d, source ) values ( #{stockId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{currentPrice}, #{changeRate1d}, #{changeRate7d}, #{changeRate30d}, #{source} ) on conflict (stock_id, snapshot_date) do update set current_price = excluded.current_price, change_rate_1d = excluded.change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d = excluded.change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d = excluded.change_rate_30d, source = excluded.source
